metadata.trigger: Audit gap discovery - specialized document classes missed

enhancement_overview.summary: Enhanced the Content Repository Auditor mode to prevent critical audit gaps where specialized document classes and integration points were completely missed due to three methodology failures: random sampling, incomplete class discovery, and ad-hoc integration mapping.
enhancement_overview.impact: These enhancements ensure future audits will: - Discover ALL document classes before sampling (100% coverage) - Use stratified sampling to represent ALL document populations - Systematically discover ALL integration points through property analysis - Validate completeness at each phase before proceeding

changes.change: Added critical requirement warning about mandatory complete class discovery
Enhanced step 1 with multiple discovery strategies (broad, domain, system keywords)
Added property-based discovery to find classes by integration patterns
Added validation search for documents not matching discovered classes
Made it explicit: analyze ALL classes including demo/test classes
Added requirement to count documents in EVERY class before proceeding
Added validation checkpoint before allowing Phase 5 to begin

enhancement.rationale: Specialized document classes were missed because class discovery was incomplete. The enhanced workflow now requires discovering ALL classes using multiple strategies (including list_all_classes tool) and validating completeness before proceeding to document sampling.

enhancement.phase: Phase 5: Document Type and Content Analysis

changes.change: Replaced random sampling with mandatory stratified sampling
Added critical requirement warning about stratified sampling
Added new step 1: Design stratified sampling plan BEFORE sampling
Defined sampling percentages by class size (100% for small, 20-50% for large)
Required creating sampling table showing plan for each class
Added step 2: Execute sampling per class with validation
Added explicit instruction to NOT skip demo/test classes
Added step 4: Calculate misclassification rate PER CLASS
Added validation checkpoints after sampling

enhancement.rationale: Random sampling missed specialized document populations entirely. Stratified sampling ensures EVERY class is represented proportionally, so no document populations can be missed.

changes.change: Replaced ad-hoc integration discovery with systematic property analysis
Added critical requirement warning about comprehensive integration discovery
Added step 1: Systematic property prefix analysis across ALL classes
Added step 2: Document creator/modifier analysis for integration accounts
Added step 3: Comprehensive integration pattern documentation
Added step 4: Integration architecture diagram requirement
Added step 5: Validation to ensure no integrations were missed
Added explicit examples (DCGD_* → Datacap, SAP* → SAP, etc.)

enhancement.rationale: Integration systems were missed because integration discovery was ad-hoc, relying only on obvious properties. Systematic property analysis across ALL classes ensures ALL integration points are discovered.

changes.change: Documented all three critical failures with root causes
Created mandatory prevention procedures for each failure
Added pre-Phase 5 validation checklist (10 items)
Defined audit quality metrics to track completeness
Documented 5 key lessons learned
Provided anti-patterns to avoid
Created enforcement guidelines

enhancement.rationale: Comprehensive documentation ensures these methodology errors are never repeated. The validation checklist provides a clear gate before proceeding to Phase 5.

improvement.after: 100% class coverage, stratified sampling from ALL classes
improvement.benefit: No document populations can be missed

improvement.before: Ad-hoc discovery of obvious integration properties
improvement.after: Systematic property analysis across ALL classes
improvement.benefit: ALL integration points discovered, not just obvious ones

improvement.after: Mandatory validation before proceeding to Phase 5
Specific lessons learned, anti-patterns, validation checklists

gate.title: Pre-Phase 5 Validation Checkpoint
gate.enforcement: Cannot proceed to Phase 5 without all CRITICAL items checked

requirements.requirement: All classes in sampling plan were sampled

metric.name: sampling_coverage
metric.measurement: Classes Sampled / Total Classes with Documents

metric.name: integration_coverage
metric.measurement: Property Prefixes Explained / Total Property Prefixes

anti_pattern.error: Using random sampling across entire repository

anti_pattern.prevention: Explicit requirement to analyze ALL classes

anti_pattern.error: Proceeding to Phase 5 without complete class discovery
Relying only on obvious integration properties
Not validating completeness at each phase
anti_pattern.prevention: Validation checklists at each phase transition

recommendation.test: Run audit on any repository with enhanced methodology
recommendation.expected_result: Should discover ALL document classes in Phase 2
Should sample from ALL classes in Phase 5
Should identify ALL integrations in Phase 6

recommendation.test: Verify validation checkpoints prevent skipping steps
recommendation.expected_result: Cannot proceed to Phase 5 without complete class inventory

recommendation.test: Confirm stratified sampling plan is created before sampling
recommendation.expected_result: Sampling table created showing plan for each class

consideration.description: Consider adding automated checks that verify: - All classes have been counted before Phase 5 - Sampling plan covers all classes - All property prefixes have been analyzed
Consider calculating an audit quality score based on: - Class coverage percentage - Sampling coverage percentage - Integration discovery completeness - Validation checkpoint completion
Consider maintaining a database of audit gaps discovered across all audits to continuously improve methodology.

conclusion.summary:
The Content Repository Auditor mode has been significantly enhanced to prevent the critical methodology failures that led to the DCGD_Document audit gap.
Key improvements: 1. Mandatory complete class discovery before sampling 2. Stratified sampling ensuring ALL classes are represented 3. Systematic integration discovery through property analysis 4. Validation checkpoints preventing incomplete work 5. Comprehensive documentation of lessons learned
These enhancements ensure future audits will be thorough, complete, and will not miss specialized document populations or integration points.
conclusion.confidence: With these enhancements, the probability of missing a document class or integration point in future audits is significantly reduced. The systematic approach and validation checkpoints provide multiple safeguards against incomplete analysis.
